segments.text: The fact that he is coming off of a difficult loss, losing that ditto can be pretty like mentally doomer, I think, if you are a player of his caliber, but I think he's doing pretty well. He's doing okay. He's alright.

full_text: The fact that he is coming off of a difficult loss, losing that ditto can be pretty like mentally doomer, I think, if you are a player of his caliber, but I think he's doing pretty well. He's doing okay. He's alright.
